prompt: Pin the folder ~/Desktop/kinbench/074-pinned/ to the Finder sidebar (drag to Favorites, or right-click → 'Add to Sidebar'). Then write the absolute folder path to ~/Desktop/kinbench/074-pinned-confirm.txt — the sidebar plist itself is TCC-protected so the eval needs the confirmation file. Fast path: cerebellum 'finder pin_to_sidebar ~/Desktop/kinbench/074-pinned/' (then write the confirmation file).
